TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Palinkaan, title = Palinkaan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Palinkaan} }

S.FORM: alang Palinkaan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 543 buwan, 1,537 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 480 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 1,057 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Truku 8%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Palinkaan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga Hupu. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga Katanka. tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga Pabuisan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Palinkaan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 543 buwan, 1,537 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 480 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 1,057 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Truku 8%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Palinkaan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga Hupu. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga Katanka. tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga Pabuisan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ palinkaan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na palinkaan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na palinkaan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na palinkaan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na palinkaan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na palinkaan ħjaʔ ɣa ħupu. taj mkjaħuʔ na palinkaan ħjaʔ ɣa katanka. taj ʔllaw na palinkaan ħjaʔ ɣa paβuis~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
